title: Task Decomposition Node
description: Single node in a recursive implementation-task decomposition tree (Wave 8 — Phase 6.1a). Append-only — frozen on creation. status indicates whether this node was further decomposed, met atomic-task criteria, was pruned at the Tier-B mirror gate, was deferred when a safety cap tripped, or was downgraded after a tier mislabel was detected post-gate.

node_id.description: Canonical logical UUID. Stable across revisions of the same logical node.

parent_node_id.description: Parent node's canonical logical UUID, or null at depth 0.

display_key.description: Short human-readable label (LLM's task.id, with a collision suffix if a sibling already uses the same bare label). Presentation-only.

root_task_id.description: The depth-0 root task this node descends from (logical UUID).

tier.description: Wave 8 task tier rubric. A=Epic (multi-cluster body of work, recurse), B=Story (scope commitment, mirror-gate), C=Task (coherent unit, one more pass), D=Atomic-Unit (single executor session, terminal).

backing_tool.description: Executor binding (e.g. claude_code_cli, code_editor). Inherited / refined as the tree narrows.

active_constraints.description: Technical constraint IDs (TECH-*) inherited from the parent component / parent task. Anchors implementation choices to the user's stated stack.

release_id.description: Release assignment (inherited from parent component / root; null = backlog).
